charles_1895.notes: Printed pages 1-4 (PDF 37-40) confirmed via visual inspection to cover Jubilees I:1-II:2. Running heads show 'መጽሐፈ፡ ኩፋሌ' (Mashafa Kufale = Book of Jubilees) with Roman chapter markers + Arabic verse numbers. Full per-chapter page map to be filled in by progressive visual inspection as OCR batches extend.

001.notes: Chapter 1 ends partway through PDF p40 with a transition to chapter 2; OCR may need page 40 split at chapter boundary during verse parsing.

tbd_chapters.002_050: Not yet mapped. Requires visual pass through PDF pages 40-210 approximately. Each chapter averages 3-4 printed pages = 3-4 PDF pages.

dillmann_ronsch_1874.notes: Composite volume: Dillmann's German translation (front half) + Rönsch's Latin fragment critical edition (chs 13-49, back half). Not yet page-mapped. Latin fragment pages need separate OCR with Latin prompt, not Ge'ez.
